arts.ttl: Club ‘admire’ Liverpool player, but deny making offer – Boost for Reds as they rule out signing him
arts.sum: Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk’s contract expires at the end of this season and the Premier League side haven’t yet tied him down to a new deal. Towards the end of last month, the centre-back told Viaplay that there’s been no update from the Reds regarding his renewal. arts.ttl: Revealed: Liverpool showing interest in winger transfer but he has one club in mind
arts.sum: Liverpool have shown an interest in Bayern Munich winger Leroy Sane in recent weeks, though his preference is for a transfer to Barcelona, sources have told CaughtOffside. Sane is nearing the end of his contract at Bayern Munich, and it seems he’s perhaps edging towards leaving the Allianz Arena instead of renewing his deal there. arts.ttl: Luis Diaz blown away by Premier League star who Liverpool have been told to 'keep an eye on'
arts.sum: Liverpool forward Luis Diaz has been speaking about his international teammate Jhon Duran

arts.ttl: Liverpool superstars Virgil van Dijk and Mohamed Salah surprise six-year-old fan with rare chromosome disorder to leave his mum in tears with a 'miracle'
arts.sum: The parents of a young disadvantaged Liverpool fan have thanked the club after they treated him to a day he will never forget.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Leicester Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups, Form and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Liverpool, currently sitting atop the Premier League, welcome a struggling Leicester side to Anfield on Thursday, December 26th at 8:00 PM GMT. The home side will be looking to extend their lead at th...

arts.ttl: Mo Salah told to join same team as former Liverpool team-mate amid 'unhappy' claim
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah's future at Liverpool remains uncertain as his contract saga drags on - with Dietmar Hamann touting Bayern Munich as an ideal destination if he chooses to move on

arts.ttl: 'I feel like' - Jordan Henderson sends blunt Virgil van Dijk contract message to Liverpool hierarchy
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk can speak to clubs outside of England from January 1 as his Liverpool contract is set to expire next summer

arts.ttl: Arne Slot shares Ruud van Nistelrooy revenge mission as he backs struggling Leicester boss
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool host Ruud van Nistelrooy's struggling Leicester on Boxing Day, with the Reds boss having never achieved a win over his Dutch compatriot as a manager

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold tells Mo Salah what he must 'never' release to Liverpool fans
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has been a key figure for Liverpool alongside Mohamed Salah in recent years and the right-back has now opened up about his off-pitch relationship with the Egyptian

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals Leicester City's Ruud van Nistelrooy advantage ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: As manager of Feyenoord, Slot drew and lost to the former Manchester United striker, who was boss of PSV Eindhoven for just over a year, but had the last laugh as his team finished seven points clear in winning the Eredivisie title. Liverpool head coach Arne Slot is looking forward to a reunion with compatriot Ruud van Nistelrooy even if his memories of their tussles in the Netherlands are not particularly happy.
